arts.ttl: Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler says 'the result will come' before Leicester Premier League clash
arts.sum: The Seagulls head coach commented on the importance of Sunday’s game before his side travel away to Leicester.

arts.ttl: Brighton on verge of beating 4 Premier League clubs to signing – Tipped to be one of league’s biggest transfers
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion are currently leading the race for Hammarby youngster Bazoumana Toure, who has a host of Premier League clubs after him. Crystal Palace, Wolverhampton Wanderers, Manchester United and Arsenal are all keen. That’s according to Fotboll Direkt, who report that Brighton are the ‘current hottest track’ for the 18-year-old winger. They state The post Brighton on verge of beating 4 Premier League clubs to signing – Tipped to be one of league’s biggest transfers appeared first on Sport Witness.
